title: Signal Harvest
logline: When a salvage engineer discovers a hidden broadcast that predicts disasters, she must decide whether to expose the conspiracy or exploit it to save her sister.

arc.beat_1: In a rain-swept megacity, Mara Quell salvages a forbidden rooftop array and stumbles on a pulse that maps tomorrow's catastrophes.
arc.beat_2: The city's data director offers her a deal while an AI drone warns her the broadcast is bait, forcing Mara to choose between profit and warning the public.
arc.beat_3: Mara sends a partial warning that saves strangers but exposes her identity, setting a manhunt in motion and hinting the signal is coming from inside the city core.

series_bible.global_style_bible: Cinematic neo-noir sci-fi with wet concrete, amber sodium glow, volumetric fog, practical lighting, and high-contrast silhouettes.

location_anchors.description: High-rise rooftop bristling with illegal antennae, slick surfaces, wind-driven rain, and a panoramic skyline.
location_anchors.visual_rules: Always show the cracked dish with glowing amber diagnostics.

location_anchors.description: Maintenance corridors below street level, lit by flickering tubes, crowded with cable bundles and vapor vents.
location_anchors.visual_rules: Keep the corridor narrow with visible condensation.

location_anchors.description: Corporate data core chamber with stacked server monoliths and a rotating holographic lattice.
location_anchors.visual_rules: The lattice emits a cold blue halo that washes the scene.

character_anchors.name: Mara Quell
character_anchors.appearance: Lean, mid-30s, shaved undercut, utility jacket with stitched patches, fingerless gloves, a small scar across her eyebrow.

character_anchors.name: IO
character_anchors.appearance: Compact drone with a single iris lens, matte black casing, blue status ring, moves with precise hovering.

character_anchors.name: Director Voss
character_anchors.appearance: Tall, late-40s, immaculate suit, silver hair, pale eyes, carries a glass data slate.

do_not_change: Amber diagnostics glow on the rooftop array
Blue halo from the data lattice in the datavault
Mara's eyebrow scar and utility jacket patches

prompt.subject: Mara Quell on a rooftop beside a cracked antenna dish
prompt.action: She wipes rain from the dish and the diagnostics flare amber
prompt.camera: Wide establishing shot with a slow dolly in
prompt.environment: Rainy megacity skyline, neon haze, lightning distant, wet concrete reflecting light

shots.description: Mara activates the illegal rooftop array.

audio.description: Wind, rain on metal, distant sirens.

prompt.subject: The antenna dish and its glowing diagnostics
prompt.action: A sharp pulse ripples across the dish, projecting a faint waveform
prompt.camera: Close-up with shallow depth of field
prompt.environment: Rain droplets bead on the metal, amber light flickers

shots.description: The signal appears for the first time.

audio.description: Electronic chirp rising into a low hum.

prompt.subject: Mara moving through a tight sublevel corridor
prompt.action: She follows a handheld scanner as IO hovers near her shoulder
prompt.environment: Flickering fluorescent lights, steam vents, cable bundles along the walls

shots.description: Mara and IO track the signal underground.

dialogue.speaker: CHAR_IO
dialogue.line: The waveform repeats every forty-one seconds. It is not random.

prompt.subject: Mara in the sublevel hub reading a projected map
prompt.action: She overlays the signal on a city grid, revealing a future collapse zone
prompt.environment: Blue-green light from the projection, misty corridor depth

shots.description: The signal predicts a structural collapse.

audio.description: Mara: This is tomorrow's fault line.

prompt.subject: Director Voss in a glass-lined office
prompt.action: He slides a data slate toward camera with a subtle smile
prompt.camera: Medium shot with a slow push in
prompt.environment: Clean corporate interior, soft gold light, city lights beyond glass

shots.description: Voss offers Mara a deal to keep quiet.

dialogue.speaker: CHAR_DIRECTOR_VOSS
dialogue.line: You found something valuable. Let me help you price it.

prompt.subject: IO hovering beside Mara in the corridor
prompt.action: The drone projects a warning glyph between them
prompt.environment: Dim corridor light, condensation drifting in the air

shots.description: IO warns the signal is bait.

dialogue.speaker: CHAR_IO
dialogue.line: Someone wants you to be seen. The signal is a lure.

prompt.subject: Mara at a public terminal
prompt.action: She records a warning, then hesitates before sending
prompt.camera: Over-the-shoulder shot, slow tilt down to her hands
prompt.environment: Crowded public space, holographic ads flicker, rain mist at the entrance

shots.description: Mara chooses to warn the public.

audio.description: Mara: If this is a trap, they will come for me anyway.

prompt.subject: The datavault lattice spinning behind Mara's silhouette
prompt.action: Security shutters slide down as red alarms ignite
prompt.environment: Cold blue halo, towering server monoliths, alarm strobes

shots.description: The manhunt begins in the datavault.

audio.description: Alarm klaxons, heavy shutters, deep bass pulse.

poster_spec.key_visual: Mara stands in silhouette before a glowing data lattice while rain streaks down a glass pane
